title: Redact PDF — Permanently Hide Sensitive Text
h1: Permanently Redact Sensitive Information in PDFs
description: Black out or blur sensitive text and images in PDFs, entirely offline. No cloud risk. Essential for users in Kyiv.

sections.title: Why Redact PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Redaction means the content is sensitive. Uploading a document to redact it defeats the entire purpose. Ours works 100% in-browser.

steps.title: Open Document
steps.description: Load the PDF containing sensitive data.

steps.title: Mark Redaction Areas
steps.description: Draw boxes over content to permanently hide.

steps.title: Apply & Download
steps.description: Content is permanently removed and saved.

sections.title: Redaction Tools for Kyiv Law Firms
sections.content: Legal professionals in Kyiv use our offline redaction tool to prepare court documents safely.

sections.title: True Permanent Redaction
sections.content: Unlike "hiding" content with black boxes in other tools, our redaction permanently removes data from the PDF structure.

sections.title: Redact Any Document Instantly
sections.content: Apply hundreds of redactions to a large document in seconds, entirely offline.

faqs.a: Yes, the underlying text and image data is permanently removed from the PDF.
Yes, both text regions and image areas can be redacted.

faqs.q: Can I choose black or white cover?
faqs.a: Yes, pick the redaction style that suits your document.
Our redaction removes data at the PDF object level, meeting court requirements.
